::: {.cell}

```{.r .cell-code}
pacman::p_load(ggstatsplot, tidyverse)
```
:::


::: {.cell}

```{.r .cell-code}
exam <- read_csv("data/Exam_data.csv")
```
:::



::: {.cell}

```{.r .cell-code}
exam
```

::: {.cell-output .cell-output-stdout}

```
# A tibble: 322 × 7
   ID         CLASS GENDER RACE    ENGLISH MATHS SCIENCE
   <chr>      <chr> <chr>  <chr>     <dbl> <dbl>   <dbl>
 1 Student321 3I    Male   Malay        21     9      15
 2 Student305 3I    Female Malay        24    22      16
 3 Student289 3H    Male   Chinese      26    16      16
 4 Student227 3F    Male   Chinese      27    77      31
 5 Student318 3I    Male   Malay        27    11      25
 6 Student306 3I    Female Malay        31    16      16
 7 Student313 3I    Male   Chinese      31    21      25
 8 Student316 3I    Male   Malay        31    18      27
 9 Student312 3I    Male   Malay        33    19      15
10 Student297 3H    Male   Indian       34    49      37
# ℹ 312 more rows
```


:::
:::



::: {.cell}

```{.r .cell-code}
set.seed(1234)

gghistostats(
  data = exam,
  x = ENGLISH,
  type = "bayes",
  test.value = 60,
  xlab = "English scores"
)
```

::: {.cell-output-display}
![](Hands-on_Ex04_02_files/figure-html/unnamed-chunk-4-1.png){width=672}
:::
:::



::: {.cell}

```{.r .cell-code}
ggbetweenstats(
  data = exam,
  x = GENDER, 
  y = MATHS,
  type = "np",
  messages = FALSE
)
```

::: {.cell-output-display}
![](Hands-on_Ex04_02_files/figure-html/unnamed-chunk-5-1.png){width=672}
:::
:::



::: {.cell}

```{.r .cell-code}
ggbetweenstats(
  data = exam,
  x = RACE, 
  y = ENGLISH,
  type = "p",
  mean.ci = TRUE, 
  pairwise.comparisons = TRUE, 
  pairwise.display = "s",
  p.adjust.method = "fdr",
  messages = FALSE
)
```

::: {.cell-output-display}
![](Hands-on_Ex04_02_files/figure-html/unnamed-chunk-6-1.png){width=672}
:::
:::



::: {.cell}

```{.r .cell-code}
ggscatterstats(
  data = exam,
  x = MATHS,
  y = ENGLISH,
  marginal = FALSE,
  )
```

::: {.cell-output-display}
![](Hands-on_Ex04_02_files/figure-html/unnamed-chunk-7-1.png){width=672}
:::
:::


::: {.cell}

```{.r .cell-code}
exam1 <- exam %>% 
  mutate(MATHS_bins = 
           cut(MATHS, 
               breaks = c(0,60,75,85,100))
)
```
:::


::: {.cell}

```{.r .cell-code}
ggbarstats(exam1, 
           x = MATHS_bins, 
           y = GENDER)
```

::: {.cell-output-display}
![](Hands-on_Ex04_02_files/figure-html/unnamed-chunk-9-1.png){width=672}
:::
:::
